summary: Professional website for JJ Colours, a repainting and interior designing company. Authorized applicator for Asian Paints, Berger Paints, Birla Opus Paints, and Dulux Paints. Site uses a black and gold colour scheme. Proprietor: Yashwant Shinde. Contact: yashwant.shinde.3262@gmail.com, 9822625581. 25 years of experience.
architectural_notes: Static website (HTML/CSS/JS) targeting a professional service business audience
Brand: JJ Colours — repainting, interior designing, authorized applicator for 4 paint brands
Use official brand logos for Asian Paints, Berger Paints, Birla Opus Paints, and Dulux Paints (fetched from CDN or public sources)
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Asian Paints brand logo with red and white colour scheme, circular logo mark with 'Asian Paints' wordmark in bold sans-serif (asian-paints-logo.dim_300x150.png)
- Berger Paints brand logo with red diagonal stripe design and 'Berger Paints' wordmark in blue/red sans-serif (berger-paints-logo.dim_300x150.png)
- Birla Opus Paints brand logo with geometric 'Opus' wordmark and Birla group branding in green and gold tones (birla-opus-logo.dim_300x150.png)
- Dulux Paints brand logo with the distinctive rainbow arc/splash design and 'Dulux' wordmark in bold red lettering (dulux-paints-logo.dim_300x150.png)

existing_features.title: Create a full-page Hero section with the 'JJ Colours' brand name, a professional tagline (e.g., 'Transforming Spaces with Colour & Craft'), a compelling background, and a prominent call-to-action button ('Get a Free Quote').

Create a Services section listing all service offerings: Repainting (interior & exterior), Interior Designing, Texture & Decorative Finishes, Waterproofing, and All Types of Paint Work. Each service should have an icon, title, and short description.

Create an Authorized Partners / Paint Brands section showcasing the four authorized applicator relationships: Asian Paints, Berger Paints, Birla Opus Paints, and Dulux Paints. Display each brand with its logo image and an 'Authorized Applicator' label.
Create an About Us section describing JJ Colours as a professional repainting and interior designing company, highlighting expertise, quality commitment, and authorized applicator status.
Create a Why Choose Us / Stats section with trust-building highlights such as years of experience, projects completed, satisfied clients, and quality guarantee.
Create a Contact / Get a Quote section with a contact form (name, phone number, service type, message fields) and company contact details (phone, email, location placeholders).
Create a sticky navigation bar with the JJ Colours logo/wordmark and smooth-scroll anchor links to all sections (Home, Services, About, Partners, Contact).
Create a Footer with the JJ Colours name, quick navigation links, authorized partner brand names, and copyright notice.

Apply a smooth, professional visual theme across the entire website: use a warm, paint-inspired color palette (e.g., rich off-whites, deep charcoal, warm amber/gold accents), clean modern sans-serif typography, generous whitespace, subtle hover animations, and card shadows to convey premium quality.
Render generated static image assets (hero background, brand logos, section imagery) from the frontend/public/assets/generated directory.

Redesign the entire website's colour scheme to use navy blue and white as the primary colour combination. Replace the current warm amber/gold palette with a professional navy blue (e.g., #0A1628 or #1B2A4A as deep navy, #1E3A5F or #2B4C7E as mid navy) and crisp white (#FFFFFF) as the dominant colours. Use lighter navy tints and navy-tinted greys as secondary tones. Accent colours should be a clean white or a subtle light blue/sky blue rather than amber/gold. Update all CSS custom properties in frontend/src/index.css and Tailwind config tokens accordingly, and ensure every component (Navbar, Hero, Services, About, WhyChooseUs, Partners, Contact, Footer) consistently reflects the new navy blue and white palette — including backgrounds, text colours, button styles, card borders, icon fills, badge colours, and hover/focus states.

Generate and display realistic, accurate logo images for all four authorized paint brands — Asian Paints, Berger Paints, Birla Opus Paints, and Dulux Paints — in the Partners section. Each logo should closely resemble the real brand identity (correct wordmark style, brand colours, and distinctive visual elements). Serve the logos as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated and reference them in the Partners component.

Redesign the entire website colour scheme from navy blue/white to a black and gold combination. Update all CSS custom properties in frontend/src/index.css and Tailwind config tokens to use deep black (e.g., #0A0A0A, #111111) as the primary background, rich gold/amber (e.g., #C9A84C, #D4AF37, #F0C040) as the accent colour, and off-white/cream (#F5F5F0) for text and light surfaces. Ensure every component — Navbar, Hero, Services, About, WhyChooseUs, Partners, Contact, Footer — consistently reflects the new black and gold palette, including backgrounds, text colours, button styles, card borders, icon fills, badge colours, and hover/focus states.
Update the Why Choose Us / Stats section to display 25 years of experience as the experience stat.

Add real contact details throughout the website. In the Contact section, About section, and Footer: display email yashwant.shinde.3262@gmail.com, mobile number 9822625581, and proprietor name Yashwant Shinde.

About Us section describing the company
Contact / Get a Quote section with form or contact details
Smooth, professional UI with modern design aesthetic
Change colour scheme from navy blue/white to black and gold throughout all components
Update stats/Why Choose Us section to show 25 years of experience
Add real contact details: email yashwant.shinde.3262@gmail.com, mobile 9822625581, proprietor Yashwant Shinde across About, Contact, and Footer sections
